CustomField.formula: IF ( ( Company__r.RecordType.DeveloperName = "Account_GlobalAccount") || (NOT(ISBLANK(Company__r.GAM__c)) ), GlobalAccount__r.ShortName__c , Company__r.Name ) & " - " & ShortSubjectDescription__c & " - " & LEFT(CreatedBy.FirstName , 1) & "." & CreatedBy.LastName
CustomField.label: Title
